title: stelis tunguraguae
intro: Stelis tunguraguae, also known as the "Stelis orchid," is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, native to Ecuador. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to treat wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Stelis tunguraguae include its ability to aid in the healing process, reduce inflammation, and protect against infection. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be applied topically to the affected area or consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
